use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF SECONDARILY INFECTED TRAUMATIC SKIN LESIONS DUE TO S. AUREUS AND S. PYOGENES
TREATMENT OF BACTERIAL INFECTIONS IN THE NASAL PASSAGE OF ADULT PATIENTS AND HEALTH CARE WORKERS WITH METHICILLIN RESISTANT S. AUREUS

indications.text:
BACTROBAN® cream is indicated for the treatment of secondarily infected traumatic skin
lesions (up to 10 cm in length or 100 cm2 in area) due to susceptible isolates of Staphylococcus
aureus (S. aureus) and Streptococcus pyogenes (S. pyogenes).

55 BACTROBAN Cream is indicated for the treatment of secondarily infected traumatic skin
56 lesions (up to 10 cm in length or 100 cm2 in area) due to susceptible strains of S. aureus and S.
57 pyogenes.

49 BACTROBAN Ointment is indicated for the topical treatment of impetigo due to: S. aureus
50 and S. pyogenes.

BACTROBAN cream is indicated for the treatment of secondarily infected traumatic skin lesions
(up to 10 cm in length or 100 cm2 in area) due to susceptible isolates of Staphylococcus aureus
(S. aureus) and Streptococcus pyogenes (S. pyogenes).

pyogenes (S. pyogenes).
